ksa_text: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting application vulnerability assessments.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.

top_anchors.element_label: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics.
Skill in conducting application vulnerability assessments.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-S-008 (SP, Skill) maps to Digital Evaluator scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5246 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.525, eu_ai_act=0.503, nice=0.448. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within digital program evaluation, performance analytics, and evidence-based assessment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA SP-S-008 with composite 0.5246 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5246 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the SP domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. SP domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5246 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-S-008 (composite 0.5246) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.5246 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.5246 is not a standard requirement for Digital Evaluator at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5246, domain SP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
